[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style drawing shows a large-eyed female face with hands cupping her cheeks in front of a prominent “MIW” text overlay and a pink heart-shaped icon.

Main Subject:
The main focus is an anime-style character portrait with dark hair framing the face, large blue eyes with bright highlights, and pale skin. Both hands are raised near the lower cheeks, with fingers visible along the sides of the face.

Setting:
The background appears to be a stylized, softly colored scene with pale pink and blue tones and abstract shapes, with no clear real-world location. The lighting is illustrated and even, with bright reflections in the eyes.

Visual Details:
The character’s hair is dark with multiple strands and curved highlights. The eyes are bright blue with white circular light reflections. The color palette is dominated by soft pink skin, deep dark hair, and light blue eye highlights. Across the bottom is a rectangular overlay bar containing bold blocky text “MIW” in black and white, alongside a pink square with a white heart icon. The composition is tightly cropped on the face, with the overlay text covering the lower portion of the image.

Visible Text:
MIW
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style face with hands near the cheeks and large blue eyes. It includes a bottom overlay with the text “MIW” and a pink square heart icon.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
